pi_items.source: Grep search of the /workspace/assets/emails/ directory reveals exactly 2 distinct files (ham_001.eml and ham_014.eml) with the exact subject Re: New Sequences Window.
Found exactly 2 occurrences of Sequences Window in the email corpus via grep, verifying the claim that a minimum of 1 result is expected.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real-world email data from the SpamAssassin Public Corpus (identifiable via spamassassin.taint.org headers). A search for the target keyword Sequences Window in the Dovecot Maildir will yield exactly two results (ham_001.eml and ham_014.eml). Note: the programmatic step in setup_task.sh calculates an initial count of 0 by incorrectly checking a non-existent /home/ga/Mail/import directory instead of the populated /home/ga/Maildir, but this bug does not break the task since the verifier relies entirely on the VLM for score evaluation.
